de.uka.ilkd.key.smt

Class SMTSolverResult

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.SMTSolverResult

  • public class SMTSolverResult
extends Object
    Encapsulates the result of a single solver.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static class  SMTSolverResult.ThreeValuedTruth
      In the context of proving nodes/sequents these values mean the following: TRUE iff negation of the sequent is unsatisfiable, FALSIFIABLE iff negation of the sequent is satisfiable (i.e.
